question: Hannah baked cookies each day for a bake sale. How many more cookies did Hannah bake on Saturday than on Sunday?
Some friends discussed the sizes of their coin collections. What is the mean of the numbers?

The employees at Tessa's Construction monitored the number of cracked window panes in each shipment they received. How many shipments had at least 40 cracked window panes but less than 60 cracked window panes?
Samir's class recorded how many cans of food each student collected for their canned food drive. What is the median of the numbers?
Some friends played a trivia game and recorded their scores. How many more points did Hannah score than Dustin?
How much money does Sidney need to buy a piece of mint chocolate and 7 peanut butter cups?
Some friends compared the sizes of their stuffed animal collections. What is the mode of the numbers?
Paula's family went on a road trip and counted the number of cars they saw each day. How many cars in total did they see on Friday and Saturday?
How much money does Leon need to buy a book about South America, a book about cats, and a book about Australia?
A sports fan decided to examine the pattern of medals won by certain countries at several Olympic games. In 1996, how many more medals did Sweden win than Finland?
How much money does Sarah need to buy an elastic band and a brass clip?

A restaurant's average food preparation time was tracked from day to day as part of an efficiency improvement program. According to the table, what was the rate of change between Wednesday and Thursday?
Dean counted the number of pieces of pepperoni on each pizza he made. What is the largest number of pieces of pepperoni?
Erik has $7,616.00. How much money will Erik have left if he buys a parrot and a kinkajou?
Gina kept track of how many laps she swam during the past 7 days. What is the range of the numbers?
This is Franco's complete financial record for September. At the end of September, how much money did Franco have?
The school district compared how many swings each elementary school has. What is the mode of the numbers?
A real estate agent looked into how many houses were sold in different cities. What is the median of the numbers?
How much would it cost to buy 3+2/5 kilograms of marinara sauce?
Several students participated in a race. What is the median of the numbers?
Eliana bought 2.8 pounds of oysters. How much did she spend?
Manny kept track of how many kilometers he walked during the past 7 days. What is the range of the numbers?
Cassie has $0.18. How much money will Cassie have left if she buys a spiral snail shell and a scallop shell?
Liam wants to buy 1.1 kilograms of mozzarella. How much will he spend?
A charity recorded how many donations it received each month. How many more donations did the charity receive in July than in August?

To figure out how many vacation days he had left to use, Austin looked over his old calendars to figure out how many days of vacation he had taken each year. According to the table, what was the rate of change between 2015 and 2016?
Harry, a huge fan, tracked the scores on his favorite radio quiz show. Which score did the fewest people receive?
Each desk has 5 highlighters. How many highlighters are on 3 desks?
Fans of the Kingwood baseball team compared the number of games won by their team each year. According to the table, what was the rate of change between 2009 and 2010?
Mrs. Whitehead hosts an annual art contest for kids, and she keeps a record of the number of entries each year. According to the table, what was the rate of change between 2013 and 2014?
The owner of a plant nursery wrote down the number of roses on each bush. How many bushes have at least 79 roses?
How much money does Carly need to buy 9 yellow bath towels and 8 fleece blankets?
A newspaper researched how many grocery stores there are in each town. What is the range of the numbers?
How much money does Rebecca need to buy baked ziti and baked chicken?
The city recorded how many fire hydrants there are on each street. What is the range of the numbers?
The McCarthy Senior Care Center monitored how often its residents got to visit with relatives last year. How many residents visited with relatives more than 2 times?

As part of a stuffed animal drive for the local children's hospital, the students at Shah Elementary School record how many stuffed animals they have collected. How many students have more than 5 stuffed animals?
A farm equipment company kept a record of the number of tractors made each month. What is the mean of the numbers?
The players on a quiz show received the following scores. What is the mean of the numbers?
Kelsey, a candy store employee, placed peppermint candies into jars of various sizes. How many jars had at least 25 peppermint candies?
Dr. Dixon, a pediatrician, weighed all the children who recently visited her office. What is the weight of the heaviest child?
How much money does Lena need to buy 9 fishing poles?
Each drawer in the dresser has 10 blouses. How many blouses are in 4 drawers?
Each shopping bag has 2 CDs. How many CDs are in 3 shopping bags?
A hardware store monitored how many hammers it sold in the past 7 days. What is the range of the numbers?
A philanthropic organization compared the amounts of money that its members donated to certain causes. How much more money did Eve donate to clean water than Eli?
Wesley counted the number of desks in each classroom at his school. How many classrooms have exactly 39 desks?
Mrs. Dorsey told students how many rounds to expect in the spelling bee based on previous years. According to the table, what was the rate of change between 2011 and 2012?
A Girl Scout troop recorded how many boxes of cookies they sold each day for a week. According to the table, what was the rate of change between Monday and Tuesday?
What is the total cost for 1 pound of licorice and 5 pounds of lemon sours?
A stock broker followed the stock prices of a certain set of companies. How much more did Computer Data Company's stock cost on Wednesday than on Thursday?
Mr. Griffith recorded the scores of his students on the most recent math quiz. How many students scored 8?
Clarksville Flooring tracked the number of broken tiles in each shipment it received last year. How many shipments had at least 53 broken tiles?
A pair of Scott High School hockey fans counted the number of games won by the school each year. According to the table, what was the rate of change between 2012 and 2013?
If Samuel buys 5 pounds of smoked bacon, 5 pounds of pepperoni, and 1 pound of salami, how much will he spend?
Some friends compared the sizes of their sticker collections. What is the mode of the numbers?
How much more does an apple tart cost than a cherry pie?
A philanthropic organization compared the amounts of money that its members donated to certain causes. How much did Tamir donate to clean water?
Brenda purchased 1.1 pounds of coarse gravel. What was the total cost?
Shelley went to the store and bought 1 pound of shrimp. How much did she spend?
